seed_problem: Maximize total weight of satisfied clauses in a synthetic weighted CNF; checker computes satisfied weight / baseline.
mutation: composite: skinned as a two-stage festival booking (boolean = Main/Side stage) and specialized the CNF to a hard weighted Max-SAT with positive-unit 'billing demands' plus binary 'rivalry conflicts' (independent-set/max-cut frustration) so the all-Side baseline is weak and no constant placement is optimal; score = satisfied weight / all-Side baseline weight.
title: Riverbank Sound Festival: Two-Stage Billing
strategies: all-Side baseline (all-zero assignment): the do-nothing calibration point
per-act greedy: order acts by Main-Stage appeal and move each to Main iff it increases satisfied weight, one sweep
coordinate-ascent local search: greedy init then best-improvement flip sweeps to a local optimum
seeded random restarts / perturbation: escape local optima by restarting from biased-random and perturbed assignments, keep best
